description_long: This is a compact, modern bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray or white color, and the roof appears to be covered with gravel or a similar material. A paved driveway leads up to the front of the house, where a white sedan is parked, and a small patio area with outdoor furniture is visible to the side. A single tall palm tree stands adjacent to the driveway, adding a touch of greenery to the otherwise clean and geometric layout. The windows are sparse and asymmetrically placed, with one prominent window on the side and a smaller one near the entrance. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban residential environment with a focus on simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a paved driveway, a parked car, a palm tree, and minimalistic outdoor furniture. The structure is compact, with light-colored walls and sparse, asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a white car, palm tree, and patio furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the car on the driveway, the flat side wall, and the palm tree to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with a single window and the patio area with furniture and palm tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and palm tree, with the house's flat side wall visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with sparse side and rear windows
